notableEvents.label: Rafael Devers GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Devers grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper. Luis Arraez to 3rd. Matt Chapman out at 2nd. Rafael Devers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Rafael Devers rally-killer GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Rafael Devers grounds into a double play, second baseman Bryson Stott to shortstop Trea Turner to first baseman Bryce Harper. Luis Arraez to 3rd. Matt Chapman out at 2nd. Rafael Devers out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Luis Arraez hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by pitcher José Alvarado. Willy Adames scores. Luis Arraez to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Otto Kemp pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Otto Kemp singles on a line drive to right fielder Jung Hoo Lee.

notableEvents.label: Error-aided run(s) allowed
notableEvents.detail: Luis Arraez hits a sacrifice bunt. Throwing error by pitcher José Alvarado. Willy Adames scores. Luis Arraez to 2nd.
